content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Choose document, fragment, HTML, or XML loading options deliberately and test wrapper insertion and case behavior.

hints: For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Cheerio Load Mode model · Theory Cheerio Load Mo…, name the owner, authorization, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, URL, robots, unknown value, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, browser, accessibility, report, handle, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Cheerio Load Mode precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Cheerio Load Mode model · Theory Cheerio Load Mo…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 3536 during an origin-fairness and event-loop capacity rehearsal. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove Cheerio loading modes, malformed tree repair, parser differentials, budgets, and source-tree distinctions; every Promise, stream, listener, timer, socket, file, browser context, and report sink needs one cleanup owner; then reorder one frontier, p-limit, Promise, AbortSignal, stream, retry, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose document, fragment, HTML, or XML loading options deliberately and test wrapper insertion and case behavior.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Cheerio Load Mode model · Theory Cheerio Load Mo…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: cheerio.load has one parsing mode suitable for every input.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The cumulative typescript portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: crawler-ts-cheerio-load-mode-ucq3je.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-ts-cheerio-load-mode-ucq3je(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?function\s+evidence_crawler_ts_cheerio_load_mode_ucq3je\s*\([^)]*\)\s*:\s*Readonly<\{[^}]+\}>\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?htmlFixtures < 13)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?explainedTrees < 13 \|\| explainedTrees > htmlFixtures)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?differentialCases < 5)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?unboundedTrees > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using choose and document plus specific case evidence.
